title: alangium tomentosum
intro: Alangium tomentosum, also known as the Alangium tree or Indian Alangium, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cornaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, particularly in Asian cultures, and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alangium tomentosum include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. Alangium tomentosum is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption, and its leaves and roots are commonly used in traditional medicine.
